# PERF-239 negative: append-only offset records
lang: go
file: PERF-239-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

type rec struct {
	id, off int
}

func buildOffsets(ids []int) []rec {
	out := make([]rec, 0, len(ids))
	for _, id := range ids {
		out = append(out, rec{id: id, off: id * 10})
	}
	return out
}
